hero.title: Privacy-Preserving Onchain Payroll
hero.description: End-to-end encrypted payroll management. All salary data is processed in its encrypted state using Fully Homomorphic Encryption, ensuring total confidentiality on the public ledger.

employerOnboarding.title: Employer Onboarding
employerOnboarding.description: To begin managing your confidential payroll, you must register your organization on the OnChain protocol. This initializes your encrypted vault.
employerOnboarding.companyNameNote: This name will be encrypted via OnChain FHE before onchain submission.

systemStatus.title: System Status
systemStatus.noSalaryData: No salary data found. Make sure you are registered as an employee.
systemStatus.scanningBlockchain: Scanning blockchain for existing company records...

secureVault.title: Secure Onchain Vault
secureVault.description: Your private keys never leave your browser. All payroll calculations are performed by the network while encrypted.

platformAdmin.title: Platform Admin
platformAdmin.description: Governance and protocol maintenance. Manages global parameters, security upgrades, and registry indexing without accessing underlying private payroll data.

employer.title: Employer
employer.description: Operational management. Controls funding, manages employee whitelists, and initiates FHE-encrypted batch payments to the smart contract vault.

employee.title: Employee
employee.description: Self-service access. Securely decrypts personal payment information using local private keys and claims available salary distributions.

status.thisWalletAlreadyHasCompany: This wallet already has a registered company

employerDashboard.title: EMPLOYER DASHBOARD
employerDashboard.securedByFhe: Secured by OnChain Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE)
employerDashboard.decryptionNote: Decryption requires cryptographic signature. Data processed onchain in encrypted state via FHE.
employerDashboard.decryptionWarning:
INDIVIDUAL DECRYPTION TRIGGERS UNIQUE FHE EVENT.
PRIVATE DATA VISIBLE FOR 10 MINUTES.
employerDashboard.copyright: © 2024 OnChain CONFIDENTIAL PAYROLL | FHE PROTOCOL V1.2
employerDashboard.noCompanyWarning: This wallet has no registered company. Go to Home and register your company first.
employerDashboard.supabaseNotSynced: Payroll exists on-chain but Supabase is not synced yet. Go back to Home and click "Complete setup" to enable roster/discovery.

fundingSection.title: FUNDING (ERC20 → CONFIDENTIAL WRAPPER)
fundingSection.flowNote: Flow: approve ERC20 → wrap → set payroll as operator → run payroll.

payrollPeriod.title: PAYROLL PERIOD
payrollPeriod.note: The selected cadence + reference determines the runId used for payroll execution.

editEmployeePlaceholder.title: EDIT EMPLOYEE
editEmployeePlaceholder.body: Select an employee from the roster (pencil icon) to edit off-chain details, update salary, or run payroll for that employee.

registerEmployeeForm.title: REGISTER NEW EMPLOYEE
registerEmployeeForm.privacyNote: Name, ID document and email are encrypted before storage. Only your company can decrypt them. The wallet address is stored as-is for payroll execution.

errors.nameRequired: First and last name are required
errors.switchToSepolia: Switch to Sepolia to use FHE encryption

employeeRoster.title: ACTIVE PAYROLL ROSTER
employeeRoster.removeConfirm: Remove this employee from the company? This will delete all their records from the database.

editEmployeePanel.title: EDIT EMPLOYEE
editEmployeePanel.employmentStatusHint: Stored off-chain (database). Example values: active, on_leave, terminated.
editEmployeePanel.salaryEncryptedHint: Salary is set on-chain using FHE encryption (the employer never reveals plaintext on-chain).

employeePage.title: EMPLOYEE PORTAL
employeePage.securedByFhe: Secured by OnChain Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE)
employeePage.connectWallet: Connect your wallet to view your payroll.
employeePage.contractsNotLoaded: Contracts not loaded for current network.

employeeCompanySelector.title: MY COMPANY ASSOCIATION
employeeCompanySelector.noAssociation: No company is currently associated with this wallet address.
employeeCompanySelector.noAssociationHint: Ask your employer to register you via the Employer Dashboard.

employeeSalaryPanel.errorNotEmployee: You may not be registered as an active employee on this contract.
employeeSalaryPanel.errorSwitchToSepolia: Switch to Sepolia to decrypt via relayer.

employeeBalancePanel.title: MY CONFIDENTIAL TOKEN BALANCE
employeeBalancePanel.note: This is your accumulated confidential token balance (ERC-7984) from all payroll runs.
employeeBalancePanel.errorSwitchToSepolia: Switch to Sepolia to decrypt via relayer.

employeeSidebar.salaryDescription: Your encrypted salary information - decrypt to view your current compensation
employeeSidebar.selectCompanyToView: Please select a company to view your salary
employeeSidebar.salaryNote: This is your current encrypted salary. Your employer can update this amount at any time.
employeeSidebar.balanceDescription: Your accumulated confidential token balance from all payroll runs
employeeSidebar.gettingStartedDesc: Learn how to set up your employee account and start managing your encrypted payroll.
employeeSidebar.securityPrivacyDesc: Understand how your data is protected with Fully Homomorphic Encryption.
employeeSidebar.troubleshootingDesc: Common issues and how to resolve them quickly.
employeeSidebar.faqDesc: Quick answers to common questions about your encrypted payroll
employeeSidebar.faqDecryptSalary: How do I decrypt my salary?
employeeSidebar.faqDecryptSalaryAns: Navigate to Salary page and click "Decrypt Salary" button. Your private keys will be used locally to decrypt your salary information.
employeeSidebar.faqFheAns: FHE allows computations to be performed on encrypted data without decrypting it first. This means your salary information remains private even while being processed on blockchain.
employeeSidebar.faqSecurityAns: Your data is encrypted end-to-end using military-grade encryption. Only you hold the private keys needed to decrypt your personal information.
employeeSidebar.faqEmployerSeeAns: Only your employer can see your salary — they are the ones who set it. No colleagues, third parties, or anyone else can access it. The encryption ensures that salary data is completely private to everyone except your employer.
employeeSidebar.securityDesc: Manage your security and privacy settings
employeeSidebar.encryptionNote: All your salary and balance data is encrypted using Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE). Only you can decrypt your personal information using your private keys.
employeeSidebar.connectionNote: Your wallet is securely connected. All transactions require your explicit approval.
